name: Day And Night Golf, LLC
address: 5101 Ashley Phosphate Rd #129, North Charleston, SC 29418
about: The Day And Night Golf Club, also known as The DANG Club, is a private, members-only indoor golf simulator facility located in the Festival Center in North Charleston, SC. The venue is climate-controlled and offers 24-hour access to its bays, allowing members to practice, take lessons with a golf pro, or play rounds on over 100 courses. It features league play, tournaments, and special events, utilizing the latest technology while maintaining a focus on creating an enjoyable atmosphere. Membership is required, with a stated cost of $130 per month plus tax, and there are no long-term contracts.
why_golfers_like_it: Over 100 virtual courses available for play
Variety of simulator games and activities beyond traditional golf
